title: spilanthes calva var. oleracea
intro: Spilanthes calva var. oleracea, also known as toothache plant, is a perennial plant species native to South America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and unique ability to numb the tongue and mouth. The medicinal properties of this plant lie in its high concentration of spilanthol, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of using toothache plant include relief from toothaches, gum inflammation, and mouth sores, as well as the potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Toothache plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or powder for use in herbal remedies, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the individual and the specific preparation method.
